description: VERIFIED LIVE: edX course search via its public Algolia index (no login; the search-only API key is the one edX embeds client-side) — structured + paginated, preferred over DOM. Tested live by Claude Code: query 'python' → 242 hits with title, partner, productOverview, marketing_url, weeksToComplete, etc.

tools.name: edx_search
tools.description: Search edX courses/programs. POST body { query: string, hitsPerPage?: number (default 20), page?: number (0-based), filters?: string }. Returns hits[] with title, partner, productOverview, marketing_url, activeRunKey, weeksToCompleteMax; plus nbHits/nbPages. VERIFIED (242 hits for 'python').
